goal: Ship-ready Aether v2: close the loops the Dreamer found (wisdom plumbing, midden reviews, monolith decomposition, TO-DOS cleanup), push to hub, and prepare for other repos to use

learnings.claim: Archaeologist pre-build scans catch latent bugs in recently-added code that was never tested in production (jq path .instincts vs .memory.instincts)
learnings.evidence: Strata-8 found seal.md used wrong jq path — builders fixed it alongside the stutter fix

learnings.claim: When fixing one bug in a code block, checking the surrounding 10 lines often reveals related bugs in the same commit
learnings.evidence: When-when stutter fix exposed adjacent jq path bug — both introduced in same commit 839ddf2

learnings.claim: Trap-based lock cleanup (acquire -> trap EXIT -> work -> trap - EXIT -> release) prevents deadlocks on error paths
learnings.evidence: instinct-create locking fix uses canonical pattern from flag-add, 7 tests pass including lock cleanup test

learnings.claim: Combining related subcommands (review+acknowledge) into a single builder task produces cleaner, more consistent APIs than splitting across workers
learnings.evidence: Mason-87 built both subcommands with consistent argument patterns and shared jq expressions, 6 tests pass

learnings.claim: Extracting bash case blocks into sourced function files requires changing positional parameter references ($2 to $1) since functions receive arguments differently than case blocks
learnings.evidence: Chaos Ant found midden-recent-failures $2 bug after extraction — limit arg was silently ignored until fixed to $1

learnings.claim: Source-and-delegate extraction pattern preserves behavior when shared infrastructure (json_ok, json_err, error constants, LOCK_DIR) is defined before the source line
learnings.evidence: 576 tests pass after extracting 9 subcommands with zero behavioral changes

learnings.claim: Documentation updates benefit from Watcher cross-checking all number references — secondary locations (architecture diagrams, directory listings) easily get missed by the builder
learnings.evidence: Watcher found 4 stale number references in secondary CLAUDE.md locations that all 4 builders missed

learnings.claim: npm install -g . with a prepublishOnly hook running validate-package.sh provides an end-to-end verification gate before hub deployment
learnings.evidence: Package validation runs automatically during global install, catches file/content issues before hub push
